description: Verso: Court record. Dated: Sunday, 12 Ḥeshvan 1461 Seleucid, which is 1149 CE. Incomplete. In which Sayyid al-Ahl testifies that he heard Abū l-Faraj ask Abū Isḥāq b. al-Shofeṭ for some wheat from the storehouse (makhzan) and the dispute over this that ensued.
description_he: פרוטוקול בית דין, 12 חשוון 1149. סייד אל-אהל מעיד על סכסוך על חיטה ממחסן.
